name: Stuffed Pechuga
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bacon in a skillet over low-medium heat and fry until crisp. Cut into 1/4 inch chunks and set aside.
2. Wash chicken breast under cold running water and pat dry with a paper towel.
3. Place chicken between sheets of waxed paper, skinless side up, on a cutting board. Flatten with a poultry hammer until the entire breast is 1/4 inch thick.
4. Turn breast over and place cheese and bacon in the center.
5. Melt butter in a small saucepan. Add mushrooms, garlic, and soy sauce and sauté until tender. Pour mixture over bacon combination.
6. Pull all sides of the breast up and over the cheese to form a large ball shape, completely covering all ingredients in the middle of the chicken.
7. Preheat oil in a deep fryer or small skillet to 350 degrees.
8. In a small bowl, combine egg and milk and beat to combine.
9. In another small bowl, combine flour, salt, and pepper.
10. Dip chicken in egg and milk bath and roll in spiced flour.
11. Submerge chicken in hot oil and fry for 4-6 minutes or until golden brown.
